calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-02-2008 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. JOHN E. O'GRADY APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;

ATTY. JOHN O'GRADY WAS QUESTIONING THE WORDS "SUITABLE GIFTS" IN THE WILL. HE INDICATED THIS IS NOT MANDATORY BUT DISCRETIONARY. THE COURT STATED THAT GIVING SUITABLE GIFTS DOES NOT MEAN NOTHING. COUNSEL TO FILE BRIEFS NO LATER THAN JANUARY 16, 2008. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JANUARY 23, 2008.

COUNSEL RETURNED TO COURT AT 10:13 AND REPRESENTED THAT HIS CLIENT WILL GIVE A GIFT OF $2,000 TO EACH OF HIS 5 CHILDREN. THE COURT VACATED ITS EARLIER ORDER OF CONTINUANCE AND COUNSEL TO SUBMIT AN UPDATED ORDER.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER: KATH BERSAMIN, CSR, 1172; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; BAILIFF: FELICIA SMITH

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
